topic: early harvesting, freshness, and potential alcohol
trigger_keywords: técnica utilizada para moderar el alcohol en climas cálidos

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Grapes are harvested earlier in their ripening cycle.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: They have accumulated less sugar and retained more natural acidity than grapes left longer on the vine.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The resulting wine generally has greater freshness and lower potential alcohol, provided flavour maturity is sufficient.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The resulting wine generally has greater freshness and lower potential alcohol, provided flavour maturity is sufficient.
